nudges.message: nudge: long session (45+ min). A fresh context window may improve response quality — consider /compact.
nudges.comment: Fires after 45 minutes of continuous work

nudges.message: nudge: 20 tool calls this session. Check token usage if cost-sensitive.
nudges.comment: Fires every 20 tool calls as a usage awareness checkpoint

nudges.message: nudge: .env file edited. Run /security-audit before committing to catch exposed secrets.
nudges.comment: Fires when a .env file is written or modified

nudges.message: nudge: session started. /scout explores your codebase | /health-monitor checks system state | /doctor runs workspace health check.
nudges.comment: Fires once per work session (8h cooldown) on start

nudges.message: nudge: /simplify reviews your recent changes for quality before presenting. Run it before showing work.
nudges.comment: Fires every 10 tool calls as a quality reminder
